channel.title: Wahaj Ayub — Research Radar
channel.description: Selected papers in topological photovoltaics, quantum geometry, noncentrosymmetric materials, Hopf phases, and mathematical condensed matter.

item.title: Non-Abelian Hopf-Euler insulators
item.description: Connects a multigap Hopf invariant to an optical integrated circular shift effect and real-space quantum geometry.

item.title: Delicate topology protected by rotation symmetry: Crystalline Hopf insulators and beyond
item.description: Develops a returning Thouless pump and a crystalline theory of delicate Hopf topology.
